query:
-- 3. Vincular usuário teste5 (id=16440031) ao financial_responsible erica (id=120001)
INSERT INTO financial_responsible_users (financial_responsible_id, user_id)
VALUES (120001, 16440031);

-- 4. Criar permissão de unidade para teste5 na PACSML (unit_id=210001)
INSERT INTO user_unit_permissions (user_id, unit_id)
VALUES (16440031, 210001);

-- 5. Verificar o resultado completo
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.role,
  fr.id as responsible_id,
  fr.legal_name as responsible_name,
  fru.unit_id,
  un.name as unit_name
FROM users u
JOIN financial_responsible_users fru_link ON fru_link.user_id = u.id
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru_link.financial_responsible_id
JOIN financial_responsible_units fru ON fru.financial_responsible_id = fr.id AND fru.ends_at IS NULL
JOIN units un ON un.id = fru.unit_id
WHERE u.username = 'teste5';
